# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: nginx:1.27
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: backend
          image: nginx:1.27
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: frontend-sa
      namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 80
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-default-deny
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []
